title: Green Tea Light Candle Holders 12 pcs, Glass Tealight Holders for Wedding Party 5 cm x 3.5 cm, Votive Candle Holder for Holidy Home Décor
features: [Green tea light holder]: Tea light holders set of 12 with classic glass ribbed design and pretty green color, they looks beautiful when a tea light is lit with it in there, create a warm ambience you are looking for. Tealight holder looks lovely on dining table or anywhere in the house

[Dimension of glass tealight holder]: 12pcs small candle holder, the size of each is 3.5 cm in height x 5 cm in diameter, which perfectly fits for standard tea light candles, small votive candles and flameless LED candles (Candles not included)

[Ideal decoration for home and events]: Tealight candle holders can be a beautiful addition to living room, dining table, bathroom, windows, widely used in wedding, birthday, anniversary, rehearsal, cocktail, engagement parties, Christmas, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Valentine's Day

[High quality tea light candle holder]: Well made sturdy vintage candle holder, heat-resistant and durable, it can be used indoors and outdoors. Each tea lights holder features thick glass walls and a weighted base to prevent it from overheating or cracking

[Safe packaging & guarantee]: Each sparkly candle holders are individually bubble wrapped and separated by cardboard to prevent breaking. If you have any questions, please don’t hesitate to contact us
description: Product Description Vohocandle Green Tealight Candle Holder Set of 12, Glass Tealight Candle Holders for Wedding Party, Tea Light Candles Holder Bulk for Home Decor Vohocandle mission is to provide high-quality and beautiful candle holders. They look great anywhere - be it a wedding, bar, restaurant, spa or home. [Unique Green Color as Gift]: this green color tealight holders are especially for some special events, forest theme wedding party, festival Christmas decoration or modern daily decor, househome celebration dinner, gift for her your friends with distinct personality These glass votive holders are beautifully made. The fluted design is a lovely detail that gives them a little pizazz without being too fussy. The design works with many decor styles. The quality is good with no rough edges or inconsistent patterns. They are shallow, but the beautiful color embedded into the glass makes the candlelight glow with just a peep of the flame at the top. Dimension 5*3.5cm (W x H) Vohocandle Since 2008 Professional on glass candle holder Foucus on high quality glass candle holders Design kinds of beautifull pattern and texture every year Cute tealight holders with Mini size, set of 12 Dimension 5*3.5cm (W x H) We are launching these small, vintage green, designed candle holder. Small size: for particular size tealight and multiple votive candles, no any block to warm glow or heat Green glass: ribbed tealight holder comes to bring you a quiet reading/ relaxing moment Vintage and romantic: thick glass in line design, these cute stuff help to create amazing atmosphere, especially in Halloween, Christmas Day Vohocandle Ribbed Tealight Holders Works as Best Home Decor, Green Color Glass Tea Light for Candle Holders Vintage Tea Light Holders Forest green tealight glass with line design, glass well made with no bubble or dot, vintage style, votives match to most decoration. For Tealight & Rustic Candle Chunky honeycomb glass tealight also work as home accent decor. (The holder for tea light is 1.6 x 0.8 inch, inner size, and pls check if you need such spec., thanks) Perfect Package and Storage We care about the shipping, the pakaging is both perfert for shipment and storage! You are expected to receive 12 count of these clear tealights bulk.
